CustomField.formula: IF( Total_Rent_Total_Price__c = 0, NULL, IF( Total_Rent_Total_Price__c <= 100000, "0 to 1 lakh", IF( Total_Rent_Total_Price__c <= 250000, "1 lakh to 2.5 lakh", IF( Total_Rent_Total_Price__c <= 500000, "2.5 lakh to 5 lakh", IF( Total_Rent_Total_Price__c <= 1000000, "5 lakh to 10 lakh", IF( Total_Rent_Total_Price__c <= 2500000, "10 lakh to 25 lakh", IF( Total_Rent_Total_Price__c <= 5000000, "25 lakh to 50 lakh", "Above 50 lakh" ) ) ) ) ) ) )
CustomField.label: Budget Range
